active_intent.details: The project should preserve local control, inspectable state, and practical self-hosting while allowing external model collaboration through MCP.
future_considerations: Expand service-to-file and test-to-service mappings after canonical architecture baseline is stable.
active_intent.summary: Ageix should run primarily under local ownership while exposing carefully governed public integration points.
active_intent.title: Local-first AI gateway

active_intent.details: This lets MCP, workers, and future UI layers compose safe operations without hardwiring every flow.
future_considerations: Expand service-to-file and test-to-service mappings after canonical architecture baseline is stable.
active_intent.summary: Ageix capabilities should be discoverable, metadata-rich, governed, and independently extensible.
active_intent.title: Composable capability architecture

active_intent.details: Chair, proposals, consultations, validation, and capability boundaries should keep collaboration safe and auditable.
future_considerations: Expand service-to-file and test-to-service mappings after canonical architecture baseline is stable.
active_intent.summary: Ageix should allow multiple agents and advisors to contribute without granting unchecked authority.
active_intent.title: Governed multi-agent collaboration

active_intent.details: This enables historical explanation and avoids repeating context collection.
future_considerations: Expand service-to-file and test-to-service mappings after canonical architecture baseline is stable.
active_intent.summary: Ageix should ground decisions and reviews in reusable evidence packages and decision traces.
active_intent.title: Evidence-driven decisions

active_intent.details: Future workers should understand where work belongs and what must be preserved before acting.
future_considerations: Expand service-to-file and test-to-service mappings after canonical architecture baseline is stable.
active_intent.summary: Ageix should document its own domains, components, services, relationships, principles, intent, and ADRs as governed architecture artifacts.
active_intent.title: Self-describing architecture

constraints.rationale: Trusted clients can still misuse access, so boundaries must be enforced in layers.
constraints.statement: External MCP clients must authenticate, authorize, and remain constrained by capability governance and trust boundaries.
constraints.summary: External MCP clients must authenticate, authorize, and remain constrained by capability governance and trust boundaries.
constraints.title: Secure external boundaries

constraints.rationale: This keeps external model context useful without oversized payloads.
constraints.statement: MCP and worker-facing context should be concise by default with explicit drill-down paths for detail.
constraints.summary: MCP and worker-facing context should be concise by default with explicit drill-down paths for detail.
constraints.title: Summary-first retrieval

constraints.rationale: Prevents autonomous or external actors from bypassing human authority.
constraints.statement: Ageix must route meaningful work through governed proposals, approval controls, and traceable authority before execution occurs.
constraints.summary: Ageix must route meaningful work through governed proposals, approval controls, and traceable authority before execution occurs.
constraints.title: Governance before execution

constraints.rationale: Evidence gives decisions a stable factual basis and preserves explainability.
constraints.statement: Architectural and implementation decisions should be supported by scoped evidence packages where available.
constraints.summary: Architectural and implementation decisions should be supported by scoped evidence packages where available.
constraints.title: Evidence before decisions

constraints.rationale: This keeps governance testable and allows intelligence to be layered later.
constraints.statement: Ageix should prefer deterministic, inspectable resolution before semantic inference or model judgment.
constraints.summary: Ageix should prefer deterministic, inspectable resolution before semantic inference or model judgment.
constraints.title: Deterministic before intelligent

constraints.rationale: Historical explainability requires snapshots that do not silently change.
constraints.statement: Accepted evidence packages, ADRs, guidance contexts, work contexts, and decision traces should preserve historical state.
constraints.summary: Accepted evidence packages, ADRs, guidance contexts, work contexts, and decision traces should preserve historical state.
constraints.title: Immutable historical artifacts

packages.brief_summary: Guidance context for MCP Platform (Ageix.MCPPlatform): principles=6, intents=5, adrs=13, conflicts=0.

impacted_nodes.description: Ageix is a local-first governed AI gateway for safe multi-agent software work. It coordinates proposals, evidence, architecture context, validation, MCP exposure, and external model collaboration while preserving human authority and deterministic governance boundaries.
impacted_nodes.name: Ageix

impacted_nodes.description: Capability Facade component within the MCP Platform domain.
impacted_nodes.name: Capability Facade

impacted_nodes.description: Registers governed capabilities and metadata for external discovery. It separates capability discovery from direct authority.
impacted_nodes.name: Capability Registry

impacted_nodes.description: Returns summary-first capability lists with filtering and pagination. It keeps growing MCP catalogs usable for external clients.
impacted_nodes.name: Discovery

impacted_nodes.description: Manages external agent-facing tool schemas, workflow hints, related tools, and discoverability. It keeps external model interaction structured and auditable.
impacted_nodes.name: External Agent Access

impacted_nodes.description: Routes MCP tool execution through governance-preserving capability handlers. It prevents external agents from bypassing Ageix service boundaries.
impacted_nodes.name: Facade Execution

impacted_nodes.description: MCP Discovery component within the MCP Platform domain.
impacted_nodes.name: MCP Discovery

impacted_nodes.description: OAuth JWT Auth component within the MCP Platform domain.
impacted_nodes.name: OAuth JWT Auth

impacted_nodes.description: Tool Registry component within the MCP Platform domain.
impacted_nodes.name: Tool Registry

impacted_nodes.description: Provides the MCP transport endpoint and bridges protocol requests into Ageix capability execution. It is the public integration boundary for model clients.
impacted_nodes.name: Transport Bridge

impacted_nodes.description: Provides authentication, authorization, trust boundaries, client controls, capability security, OAuth/JWT validation, and abuse hardening. It assumes trusted clients can still misuse access and therefore defends at multiple layers.
impacted_nodes.name: Security Platform

impacted_nodes.description: Maintains identity, session state, workflow context, and continuity across governed interactions. It lets stateless external agents participate without being allowed to self-assert authority.
impacted_nodes.name: Session Platform

resolved_architecture_nodes.description: Exposes governed Ageix capabilities to external model clients through discoverable, permissioned, summary-first tools. It preserves governance while enabling ChatGPT and future clients to retrieve and execute approved capabilities.
resolved_architecture_nodes.name: MCP Platform

scope.work_summary: Sprint 25.5 final MCP platform hardening and publication. Scope: capability catalog audit, governance hardening, MCP response consistency, runtime/repository cleanup, governed MCP catalog publication, and final validation for transition to the Ageix Human Interface phase.

work_summary: Sprint 25.5 final MCP platform hardening and publication. Scope: capability catalog audit, governance hardening, MCP response consistency, runtime/repository cleanup, governed MCP catalog publication, and final validation for transition to the Ageix Human Interface phase.: resolved 1 architecture node(s) (MCP Platform) with 12 direct impacted node(s).
